Internal Launches
▪ 	An Internal Launch is a launch to just your list - no affiliates or JV
(Joint Venture) Partners
▪ 	This is the classic Sideways Sales Letter
▪ 	Bigger results than a Seed Launch or Quick Launch
▪ 	Much simpler than a big JV Launch
▪ 	This is the real “bread and butter” in the PLF world
▪ 	Elegant launches where you have the maximum control… and they
happen on your time frame
